stepTitle: Consider the function $$f(x)=\begin{cases}2, &x\ne$$ $$5\\7, &x=5\end{cases}$$. $$If$$ $$you$$ $$graph$$ $$it$$, $$it$$ $$looks$$ $$like$$ $$the$$ $$horizontal$$ $$line$$ $$y=2$$ with an open circle at $$(5,2)$$ and a filled point at $$(5,7)$$. $$Which$$ $$statement$$ $$is$$ $$true$$?
choices: The limit does not exist, but $$f(5)=7$$
